name: Hypnocorn
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>幻</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>角</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>フュプノコーン
desc: When this card is Normal Summoned, if your opponent controls a monster and you control no other monsters: You can target 1 Set Spell/Trap Card on the field; destroy that target.
mnst_eff: When this card is Normal Summoned, if your opponent controls a monster and you control no other monsters: You can target 1 Set Spell/Trap Card on the field; destroy that target.
eff: When this card is Normal Summoned, if your opponent controls a monster and you control no other monsters: You can target 1 Set Spell/Trap Card on the field; destroy that target.
